# Weekly Updates Archive

| 2026-01-17 | `2026-01-17-weekly-update.md` | First weekly update |

## How Updates Are Generated

Run `/weekly-update` on Friday afternoons. The skill:
1. Queries Slack project channels for the past 7 days
2. Synthesizes into Shipped / In Progress / In Design / Notes
3. Presents draft for review
4. Posts to your team channel
5. Archives to this directory
